---
title: "Comparison with analytical solution"
bibliography: references.bib
page-navigation: true
---

In addition to comparing pySLAMMER's results against the legacy SLAMMER outputs, it is worth comparing them against analytical solutions to sliding-block problems. Closed-form solutions are not available for complex ground motions, but they can be derived for simple harmonic motions and pulses [@conte1989].

This page will report pySLAMMER's calculated rigid sliding displacements for single-cycle harmonic motions over the 0.5–10 Hz frequency range against the corresponding analytical solution.

::: {.callout-note}
## Placeholder

The analytical-comparison study has been scoped but not yet written up. The [SLAMMER results comparison](comp_SLAMMER_results.qmd) is the current authoritative verification reference.
:::
